# cortex_aws_integration_types (Resource)

AWS Integration Types Configuration allows you to configure which AWS resource types are discovered. This is a singleton resource.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `types` (Attributes List) List of AWS types and whether they're configured. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--types))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--types"></a>
### Nested Schema for `types`

Required:

- `configured` (Boolean) Whether the type is configured.
- `type` (String) The AWS type.
